title: Aperture Innovations - Portal Gun
description: The Portal Gun From Portal 1 and Portal 2 and more!
body:
TL;DR

Aperture Innovations is a Portal Gun mod first and foremost, adding the Portal Gun from our beloved Portal 1 and Portal 2 video games. Speedy thing comes in, Speedy thing comes out, be it through a portal on The Moon or somewhere in your base. Customize your Portal Gun as you wish, and remember to have fun.

Greetings, [Subject Name Here]!

Cave Johnson here! The bean counters keep telling me that our top-of-the-line product 'Aperture Science Hand-held Portal Device' needs more 'fashion sense', so I fired him. The next guy told me the same thing though, so we're rolling out replacable paint canisters in your universe! That's right, you get to make your own Portal Device! Here are the blueprints, now let's do some science! Greg, back to finding the moneyverse!

Features

  • The Portal Gun
  • An extensive Variant system for The Portal Gun
  • Customizing your Portal Gun with dyes
  • The Long Fall Boots
  • Great configs for both map-makers and tech-focused modpacks!

Credits

Developers

  • mistersecret312 - Lead Developer

Artists

  • ᐰ Destiny ᐰ - Lead Artist

Special Thanks

  • Povstalec
  • Valve
